engine: vLLM XPU with llm-scaler unsigned-u4 MoE decode path
experiment: Decode-only router-logits fusion for MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound INT4 MoE
conclusion: Do not promote. The decode-only logits path is functional with pidfd IPC but is slower than the stable explicit-router u4 decode path.

runs.name: decode_only_logits_default_ipc_p1n8
runs.finding: Rank 1 spun in libze_intel_gpu.so.1/urEventWait while peers waited.

next_steps: Keep VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE_LOGITS unset for normal benchmarks.
Prioritize reducing TP/attention communication and model-load overhead before revisiting router fusion.
If revisited, profile per-layer timing around router_select, quant_apply, and the logits bridge to confirm whether router glue is large enough to justify a fused helper.

localmaxxing.reason: Valid negative experiment, but not a useful leaderboard result because it is slower than already-submitted stable u4 decode runs.
